children.heading: Central Intelligence Agency
children.label: a Central Intelligence Agency
children.text: There is a Central Intelligence Agency.

children.heading: Function
children.label: b Function
children.text: The function of the Central Intelligence Agency is to assist the Director of the Central Intelligence Agency in carrying out the responsibilities specified in .section 3036(c) of this title
